calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee On Waiver Of Report And Account
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Appt Of Trustee Due To Vacancy Caused By Nominated Trustee Who Has Declined To Act And Petition For Pereliminary Distribution On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for Eugene Roberts.

Mr. Paolini stated that the waiver by Diane Long was delivered yesterday, that he got a non-probate appraisal on the house, that there were securities and a bank account with substantial balances, that there was a separate property account of the Decedent that would allow for distribution of the $60,000.00 without exceeding 50% of the estate value and that he was at the point of crunching numbers to figure out what goes to the trust and what goes to the Decedent. In addition, he stated that there were tax ramifications, that if the $60,000.00 in charitable bequests were not made by January 3, 2010, that the total would begin to accrue 7% interest, and that he would be giving the $75,000.00 distribution as income not principal. The Court will allow $75,000.00 be distributed out of income and stated that a partial Inventory and Appraisal was needed for the $60,000.00 charitable bequest. The Court granted the petition subject to the filing of the partial Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
